name: Gold Star Pawn & Gun Shop
description_short: Gold Star Pawn & Gun is an Ohio-licensed firearms and sporting goods retailer offering retail financing for purchases $500+, with APRs between 15.99%-23.99% and terms up to 48 months.
description_long:
Gold Star Pawn & Gun operates as a firearms and tactical equipment retailer based in Ohio under license PB.100469. The business maintains a physical storefront with specified operating hours (Mon-Fri 10am-5:55pm, Sat 10am-3:55pm) and operates an e-commerce platform at goldstarpawnshop.com. The company is part of the GEARFIRE network of retailers.

The company's primary offerings include new firearms across multiple categories (handguns, rifles, shotguns, black powder weapons), ammunition, firearm parts and accessories, optics, knives, tactical gear, and outdoor equipment. They maintain extensive product inventory spanning lower receivers, bolt action rifles, semi-automatic weapons, shotguns, magazines, body armor, safes, holsters, and suppressors/NFA items. All firearm sales comply with federal and state background check requirements through FBI/BATFE protocols.

Gold Star distinguishes itself through its retail financing program offered by U.S. Credit, Inc., available for purchases of $500 or more with no money down. The financing structure includes fixed APRs scaled to FICO scores, flexible terms from 18-48 months, and special 'same-as-cash' promotional financing for purchases $1,000+. Critically, the company offers "no transfer fees when buying on this site and picking up in-store," a competitive advantage for online firearms purchases. They explicitly note no prepayment penalties for early loan payoff.

However, Gold Star functions primarily as a firearms retailer with attached financing rather than a traditional pawn shop offering collateral-based loans. The financing program carries relatively high APRs (15.99%-23.99%), typical for retail credit but substantially above traditional bank rates. The 60-day credit approval window and restriction to maximum two open loans limit flexibility. As with all firearms retailers, purchasing is subject to federal regulations and background checks, which may create barriers or delays for certain consumers.
pros: No transfer fees for in-store pickup of online firearm purchases, reducing total acquisition costs
Retail financing available with no money down for purchases $500+, making purchases accessible without upfront capital
Fixed APR structure (15.99%-23.99%) means no rate increases over the loan term, providing payment predictability
Special 'same-as-cash' promotional financing available for purchases $1,000+ with no interest if paid within promotional period
Extended financing terms up to 48 months allow for flexible repayment schedules based on purchase amount
No prepayment penalties permit early loan payoff without financial penalty
Extensive inventory across firearms categories, ammunition, tactical gear, and outdoor equipment in one retailer
cons: APR range of 15.99%-23.99% is substantially higher than traditional bank personal loans (typically 6%-36% depending on credit)
Not a true pawn shop—does not offer collateral-based loans or accept pawned items, limiting services for consumers seeking quick collateral loans
60-day credit approval window is restrictive; subsequent credit requests require re-application and re-evaluation
Maximum of two concurrent open loans and restricted high credit limits reduce borrowing flexibility for larger purchases
Special financing terms void if any monthly payment is late more than 15 days, creating strict penalties for payment delays
best_for: Firearms and tactical equipment enthusiasts seeking to purchase specific weapons or gear with flexible financing
Consumers with fair-to-good credit (FICO scores affecting 15.99%-23.99% APR range) unable to pay upfront for equipment purchases
Online firearms buyers in Ohio seeking to avoid transfer fees through in-store pickup
Hunters and shooters needing to finance larger purchases of weapons, ammunition, and tactical accessories
diagnosis: Gold Star Pawn & Gun is best for Ohio firearms enthusiasts and tactical equipment buyers who have fair-to-good credit and seek flexible financing without upfront payment for weapons and accessories. The main caveat is that this is a specialized firearms retailer with attached retail financing—not a traditional pawn shop offering quick collateral-based loans—and APR rates (15.99%-23.99%) are substantially higher than conventional personal loans, making it suitable primarily for firearms purchases rather than general-purpose consumer financing.
services: Retail installment financing for purchases $500+ with APRs 15.99%-23.99% based on FICO score
Special same-as-cash promotional financing for purchases $1,000+ with zero interest if paid within promotional period
Firearm sales with FBI/BATFE background check compliance
E-commerce platform with in-store pickup option (no transfer fees)
Handgun sales (semi-automatic, revolvers, derringers, single shot, black powder)
Rifle sales (semi-automatic, bolt action, lever action, pump action, tactical, black powder)
Shotgun sales (pump action, lever action, single shot, semi-automatic, over-under, side-by-side, bolt action)
Ammunition sales (rifle, handgun, shotgun, rimfire, bulk, slugs, blanks)
Firearm optics and accessories (scopes, red dots, night vision, thermal, binoculars, rangefinders)
Tactical gear and body armor sales
Knife sales (fixed blade, folding, out-the-front, utility)
NFA regulated items (suppressors, short-barreled rifles, machine guns, destructive devices)
